params.name: Oedipus Rex Mask
params.description: Oedipus Rex is a representative work by Sophocles, set against the backdrop of an ancient Greek legend, telling the story of King Oedipus, who unknowingly kills his father and marries his mother, suffering immense mental anguish and physical pain as a result. In the play, the actor playing Oedipus blinds himself and ultimately chooses self-exile. The play's cultural and artistic achievements are profound, occupying an important place in literary history and deeply influencing the development of  …
